baseline.head: f424f51
baseline.working_tree_at_start: clean (one unrelated parked stash on super-focus.html)

method: control -> event handler -> client validation -> API route/nav target -> server handler -> persisted state -> refreshed UI -> error recovery. Every literal client fetch URL cross-referenced against the ~197 server route constants; every relative nav/link target checked on disk.

pages.note: slot-safety, single-lock video queue, PRESTO/vidnux routing, path-guards, per-row clear/regenerate/retry, full-res viewers, esc()-escaped output all verified
orientation panel + planning board; DEF cache-buster mismatch (P3, backlog)
PRESTO video next-task confirm wording understated (P2, backlog)
cancel-confirm stale state + blob-url leak FIXED; re-review pasted-JSON relies on server validation (P3, backlog)
2 dead package-run Script links FIXED; hardcoded Parked section still stale (P2, backlog)
PRESTO submit gate is client-side; server-side gate suggested (P2, backlog)
manual upload slot-overwrite (P0) FIXED: confirm_replace + archive
rough-cut blank result panel FIXED; human gate decisions non-persistent (P2, backlog)
non-persistent timer is by-design and disclosed
clip-hidden-on-ffprobe-failure (P2) FIXED: viewability keyed on file existence
Submit + Delete&replace dead in default nav state (P1) FIXED: run-writability gate + explanation
esc() does not escape single quotes in inline handlers; server-controlled paths only (P3, backlog)
no auto-render on load; refuses cloud/Remotion (verified)
MISSING Cancel-render control ADDED (wired to existing /api/earth-studio/cancel)
live vertical lane (not a stale super-focus duplicate); unclosed Step-3 div FIXED; upload slot-overwrite FIXED with super-focus fix

defects.summary: Manual GPT-image upload overwrote a populated flux-NNN.png with no existence check and no confirmation, destroying generated media.
defects.fix: Server rejects an occupied slot with 409 unless confirm_replace; on replace it archives the existing file to images/flux-local/superseded/ (never deletes). Both clients catch 409 and confirm before resending with confirm_replace.
tests: workflow-path.test.js: confirm_replace archives old + installs new

defects.summary: Submit for review and Delete & replace 404 in the default nav-reachable state (RUN_ID hardcoded to a non-existent run; nav carries no ?run=).
defects.fix: Page probes run-writability up front; when no real package-runs/<id>/ folder exists it disables Submit + all Delete&replace buttons and shows an explanation. Server still 404s appropriately (invariant enforced both sides). Proven live in headless Chrome.
tests: topic-scout-nonce.test.js: writability gate, submit refusal, delete disabled, init order

defects.summary: Rough-cut review result panel rendered blank on a PASS: renderResult read payload.summary but the route returns payload.review (camelCase).
defects.fix: renderResult falls back to payload.review; rough-cut uses camelCase keys; booleans render Yes/No.

defects.summary: A clip present on disk was hidden and labelled 'missing' when ffprobe failed or timed out (e.g. large VIDNAS clips).
defects.fix: mp4_url is now keyed on fs.existsSync (clip always playable if present); probe failure surfaces as 'spec unknown' (exists:true, spec_known:false) rather than 'missing'.

defects.summary: Lightbox templated src/name into innerHTML; a filename/path with a double quote could break out of the attribute.
defects.fix: Lightbox media built with createElement + property assignment (not an HTML-parsing sink).
tests: operator-control-fixes.test.js: openLightbox uses DOM API, no innerHTML templating

defects.summary: No GUI Cancel for a long-running frames->MP4 render, though /api/earth-studio/cancel + lane.cancelRender exist.
defects.fix: Added a Cancel render button visible only while a render is active, wired to the existing cancel route.

defects.summary: Two 'Script' links pointed at purged package-runs/<run>/final-script.md (404).
defects.fix: Removed the two dead links (valid 'Open full page' links kept).

defects.summary: Cancelling the confirm dialog left the card 'Pending selection' and Download buttons enabled.
Outline .md download never revoked its blob object URL.
Step 3's .shorts-step div was never closed; Steps 4-7 rendered nested inside it.
defects.fix: Added the missing ; file div balance 42/42.

defects.summary: Media Refresh was a silent no-op when no run was focused.
defects.fix: Shows a 'focus a run first' message.

backlog.summary: Hardcoded Parked/Approved cards describe purged runs; make data-driven or mark as a static historical note. Broader change than the audit's narrow-fix scope.

PRESTO submit eligibility (video-prompts present) is enforced client-side only; add a server-side 409 guard in handlePrestoSubmit before spawning run-production.py. Touches the real-render path; verify with a stubbed-spawn route test.
Human gate decisions + pre-flight checklist + YouTube URL do not persist across reload/run-switch. Persist per-run (localStorage or nonce-gated write) and restore on run change.

Manual uploads still live under images/flux-local/ and are double-listed/mislabelled as LOCAL-FLUX by package-media-index + media-gallery. Store under a distinct dir (e.g. images/gpt-manual/) as manual-media-import.js does.
Re-review applies arbitrary pasted JSON; filter through model.editableCandidateFields() client-side to mirror the edit form (server whitelist to be confirmed independently).
PRESTO video next-task control offers only a real-run button with an understated confirm; add dry-run parity and/or a specific confirm ('Start a real Wan2.2 render on PRESTO?').
esc() does not escape single quotes used in inline onclick args (server-controlled paths only); move to delegated data-copy or extend esc.
styles.css ?v= and JS ?v= cache-busters are out of lockstep; align on release.

dead_or_unreachable_routes.assessment: backend capability with no UI; not a blocker for the current workflow
was unreachable; NOW WIRED to the new Cancel render button
status is served via /api/earth-studio/status; this variant unused
config read; consumed server-side, no UI
diagnostic index; no direct UI caller
dashboard computes GPS client-side; server route unused
dashboard renders inspector client-side; server route unused

rejected_control_proposals.reason: Real gap (B3) but larger than the audit's narrow-fix scope; belongs in a scoped follow-up, not this pass.
Would be a broad UI redesign; the concrete broken controls (dead links) were fixed instead.

rejected_control_proposals.proposal: PRESTO video 'dry run' button on focus/workspace
rejected_control_proposals.reason: Backlogged (B6) as a judgment call about workflow shape; not added speculatively.

rejected_control_proposals.proposal: Super Focus 'clear/retry all failed queue items' batch control
rejected_control_proposals.reason: Per-row retry (re-queue) + cancel-queued already cover recovery; a batch button would add clutter without a demonstrated blocker.
No operator workflow currently requires manual topic-status editing; adding a control would be speculative.
